How do you use pandia
I’ve been struggling to get the hang of her tbh

you can do the following:
-as a wheel activator (the wheel that activate on exalt like nobleman because she has huge aliemus gain)
-as an aliemus disabler (her exalt and card have huge aliemus drain in both of them)
-strike comp buffer (usually you want to give the 3 charge to someone that benefited a lot from a "strike" card like cassius or alva)

other than that the more she exalt the stronger she gets (+3 amp) that by the end her cards will hit hard
this is just the basic since you can use her 1 cost to hit your own unit for faster aliemus gain too
the vulnerable should be used when you're sure you will kill the opponent or do huge amount of damage
Pandia is one of those units that 24 really likes that I've never used because ~~I'm retarded~~ I usually want to use other units more

Usually I see people put Pandia on a team with someone who gets a lot of usage out of their skills and an okay amount of usage out of their ultimate; you get to choose with Pandia whether or not ulting is in your best interest, and Pandia herself also gets the amplification, so you can also do stuff like Annihilated Rebirth and give Pandia cards that aren't mega hot ass to actually benefit from the amplification

And how do you play the bleed comp
turn off brain
just search for clem cards
bleed spam

Giant's Blade on whoever draws their bleed card first and Liz can Enhance herself; Delayed Falter is also a common choice if you have what'sherfuck; slam two bleed cards back to back and watch them die repeatedly
Kathigu-Ra or Amber-Tinted Death will set up into Frenzied Catalysis and Emerald Starfall if you don't have a more convenient means of inflicting Vulnerable to an entire team. ~~You won't.~~
Bloody Feast on either of the two relatively unimportant schmucks lets Clementine know who has cards to discard with Mindstrangulation and Lifeform Reconstruction

Kathigu-Ra really is the worst version of it. Giant's Blade on Clementine turn 1, KR hits Delayed Falter Turn 2, turn 3 or 4 Clementine uses boosted Frenzied Catalysis and Liz uses Guardian Green Flames into Emerald Starfall. Everybody on the other team takes 50 Bleed and if they don't have Nobleman's Staff or gambled right with Casiah's wondrous magic *right now* they're not really in a position to stop you anymore.
